titlestmt.author: Compiled by Thomas J. Balcerski

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-12 00:06:49 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Thomas J. Balcerski Acacia Fraternity papers
did.physdesc: Correspondence, Memorabilia, Movie Film, Photographs, Printed Materials, Publications, Research Materials
did.abstract: Papers regarding research for the book Acacia Fraternity at Cornell : the first century.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers regarding research for the book Acacia Fraternity at Cornell : the first century.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Thomas J. Balcerski Acacia Fraternity papers, #6853. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Research Later Years, World War II to the Wing, 1940s-1950s
Copies of Deeds from County Clerk's Office
Acacia Fraternity: The First Half Century by William S. Dye, Jr. (Photocopy)
Acacia: The Third Quarter Century by Delmer Goode (photocopy)
History of the House Now at 303 E. Upland Road, Ithaca, NY
Fraternities without Brotherhood by Alfred McClung Lee (photocopy)
History Project Promotional & Meeting Agendas and Minutes
Cornell Acacia Centennial Weblog, through February 2006
Early Drafts of Chapter 7, Prologue, and Notes
Author's Second Draft with Comments by TJB
May 1, 2007 "First" Draft with Comments by TJB
Comments on Draft from Carol Kammen
Comments on Drafts from Clara Y. Tow '07
Comments on Draft by Bill Cammuso '92
Draft with Comments by David Klesh '02
Draft with Comments from Tim Thom '82
Final Draft - Sent to Printer July 25, 2007
Author's Third Draft with Index Notes
Comments on Third Draft by Daniel Chazin, Copy Editor
Post-Centennial Correspondence and Acacia Fraternity at Cornell: The First Century Correspondence
Thomas J. Balcerski Acacia Fraternity Papers, Agreements
Correspondence with Jeremy Davis, Iowa State Chapter
History of Acacia Fraternity at Iowa State University, 1909-2009: Recollections of a Century of Brotherhood by George W. Gross, Harold D. Zarr, and Jeremy N. Davis
Series V - Centennial Capital Campaign Papers
Capital Campaign Invoices and Project Plans
Letter from William S. Dye, Jr
Acacia History Project Oral Interview Cassettes
Acacia Fraternity, Cornell Chapter: 100 Years of Brotherhood (DVD)
Acacia "Dream House" Maps, Plans, and Blueprints
Photographs taken from 35 mm slides by John Male
National Geographic Society: Directions Up, Down, All Around (featuring footage from Acacia chapter house)
Cornell Acacia Centennial Pictures by Andrew Brenner '91
Cornell Days DVD by James Symons '54
Cassette tape interview with Bradley Ayres '06
Cornell Acacia Centennial Fraternal Composite Services Footage Friday night
Cornell Acacia Centennial Fraternal Composite Services Footage Saturday night and video
